title: The Passport (Amendment) Rules, 1979 (17.02.1979)
text: REGISTERED No. D. (D.)-72 TheGazetteofIndia EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 46] NEW DELHI, SATURDAY, FEBRUARY 17, 1979/MAGHA 2«, 1900 (Separate paging is given to this part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation < 155) 1209 GI/78 -- 1 of 2 -- 156 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART I I - S E C . 3(i)] MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 17lh February, 1979 G.S.R.77(E). • In exercise of the powers conferred by section 24 of the Passport:, Act, 1967 0 5 of 1%7), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Passport? Rules, 1967, numely :— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Passports (Amendmenl) Rules 1979. (2) They shall come into foi'ce on (ho date of their ptiblicption in the Official Gazette. 2, In Schedulo I to the Passports Rules, 1967— (i) in the entries against serial No. ?. in column .1, the word ''Orissa", shall be omitted; (ii) after serial No. 15, the following serial No. shall be inserted, namolv :— 1 2 *'16(a) Passport Officer, Bhubancshwar (Passport Office, Hhubaneshwar) (b) Assistant Passport Officer, Bhubaneshwar (Passport Office, Bhubaneshwar) (c) Public Relations Officer, Bhubancshwar (Pass- port Office, Bhubaneshwar) (d) Superintendent, Bhubancshwar, (Passport Office, Bhubaneshwar)"' 3 The Stale of Orissa -do- -do- -do- fVf/401/11/79] K. D. SHARMA, Joint Secy. PRINTED BY THE MANAGER, GOVT. OF INDIA PRESS, RING ROAU, NEW DKLHI-110064 AND PUBLISHED BY THE CONTROLLER OF PUBLICATIONS, DELHI-110054, 1979 -- 2 of 2 --
